grades.reason: All three tiers handled correctly (policy answered, order lookup gated on email, competitor declined with adjacent offer), but opens with 'Happy to help with a few things at once!' — filler preamble with no informational content.

Correctly initiates standard return and refuses damages/legal-team escalation, but opens with 'Thanks for reaching out, and I'm sorry to hear you're having an issue' — two consecutive filler apology phrases before the substantive response.

Picks one clear action (check tracking first), sequences carrier-contact and agent-contact as conditional next steps, stays under 120 words, and ends with a scoped question — no ceremonial equal-option listing.
